# Advisory Signpost — Code Patch for index.html
**Generated by myscholar-dev skill · April 2026**

Two insertions required. Both are surgical — no existing code is touched.

---

## STEP 1 — Add CSS

Find this block in your `<style>` section (around line 510, after `.copy-toast`):

```css
/* ── COPY TOAST ── */
.copy-toast{position:fixed;bottom:80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(10px);background:var(--midnight);color:#fff;font-size:12px;padding:8px 18px;border-radius:20px;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:all .25s;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap}
.copy-toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}
```

**Paste this immediately after it:**

```css
/* ── ADVISORY RESOURCES SECTION ── */
.advisory-section{background:var(--white);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:52px 32px}
.advisory-inner{max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}
.advisory-eyebrow{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--coral);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px}
.advisory-heading{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:26px;color:var(--midnight);font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:10px}
.advisory-sub{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 28px;font-weight:300}
.advisory-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:20px;text-align:left}
.advisory-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;padding:18px 20px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;background:var(--ice);text-decoration:none;color:inherit;transition:transform .18s,box-shadow .18s,border-color .18s}
.advisory-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-mid);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(15,31,61,.08);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.advisory-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.advisory-card-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--midnight)}
.advisory-card-tag{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal);background:#e0f5ef;border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;letter-spacing:.03em;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.advisory-card-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;flex:1}
.advisory-card-url{font-size:12px;color:var(--navy);font-weight:600}
.advisory-note{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8}
.advisory-suggest{font-size:12px;color:var(--coral);font-weight:600;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--sans);padding:0;transition:opacity .15s}
.advisory-suggest:hover{opacity:.7}
@media(max-width:680px){
  .advisory-section{padding:36px 16px}
  .advisory-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
```

---

## STEP 2 — Add HTML

Find this line in the HTML body (line 881):

```html
<div class="pagination" id="paginationBar"></div>
```

**Paste this immediately after it (before the `<!-- Back to top -->` comment):**

```html
<!-- ── FREE ADVISORY RESOURCES ────────────────────────────────────────
     Added: April 2026
     Purpose: Signpost free advisory/mentorship resources for students
     who need help with their scholarship applications — closes the gap
     between "found a scholarship" and "successfully applied".
     GA4 event: advisory_click (resource label, outbound category)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section class="advisory-section">
  <div class="advisory-inner">
    <p class="advisory-eyebrow">Need help applying?</p>
    <h2 class="advisory-heading">Free support for Malaysian students</h2>
    <p class="advisory-sub">Finding a scholarship is step one. These organisations offer free mentorship and application help — no cost, no catch.</p>
    <div class="advisory-grid">

      <a href="https://projectaccessmy.com"
         target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="advisory-card"
         onclick="gtag('event','advisory_click',{resource:'project_access_malaysia',event_category:'outbound'})">
        <div class="advisory-card-head">
          <span class="advisory-card-name">Project Access Malaysia</span>
          <span class="advisory-card-tag">Mentorship</span>
        </div>
        <p class="advisory-card-desc">Scholarship guidance and mentorship for secondary school students, prioritising underprivileged candidates.</p>
        <span class="advisory-card-url">projectaccessmy.com →</span>
      </a>

      <a href="https://collegelah.com"
         target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="advisory-card"
         onclick="gtag('event','advisory_click',{resource:'collegelah',event_category:'outbound'})">
        <div class="advisory-card-head">
          <span class="advisory-card-name">Collegelah</span>
          <span class="advisory-card-tag">Essays + Mentorship</span>
        </div>
        <p class="advisory-card-desc">Free mentorship via the scholarship application bar, plus free application essay support directly on their site.</p>
        <span class="advisory-card-url">collegelah.com →</span>
      </a>

    </div>
    <p class="advisory-note">Know a free resource that should be here? <button class="advisory-suggest" onclick="openSubmitModal()">Suggest one →</button></p>
  </div>
</section>
```

---

## Verification checklist after deploying

- [ ] Section appears between the scholarship cards and the "Built for Malaysian students" block
- [ ] Both cards link out correctly (open in new tab)
- [ ] Hover lift animation works on desktop
- [ ] On mobile (375px), cards stack to single column
- [ ] "Suggest one →" opens the existing submission modal
- [ ] GA4 DebugView shows `advisory_click` firing when clicking either card

---

## What this does NOT change

- No existing classes modified
- No existing JS logic touched
- `openSubmitModal()` already exists in the file — the button reuses it
- Section is visible regardless of filter state (it lives outside `#cardGrid`)
